docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-14-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY HALL, GARLAND AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHASE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT MANLEY--BRANCH MGR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, GARLAND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHASE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
